text: BREAKING: Major 7.1 earthquake hits central Turkey. Buildings collapsed in Malatya province. Rescue teams mobilizing. Casualties feared. #earthquake #Turkey
Flooding in downtown Houston is insane right now. Water up to car roofs on I-45. DO NOT drive. Stay home. #HoustonFlood
Wildfire spreading fast near Kelowna BC. Evacuation order for 3 neighborhoods. Smoke visible from 50km away. Air quality hazardous. #BCWildfire
Category 4 hurricane approaching Barbados. Winds 150mph. All residents urged to seek shelter immediately. Landfall expected in 6 hours.
Small tremor felt in San Francisco Bay Area. USGS reports M3.2. No damage reported so far. Residents report shaking lasted 5 seconds.
Flash flood warning issued for Mumbai. Monsoon rains exceeding 200mm in 6 hours. Local trains suspended. Avoid low-lying areas. #MumbaiRains
URGENT: Dam breach reported near Brumadinho. Downstream villages being evacuated. Military deployed. Potential for massive mudslide. #Brazil
Tornado touched down in Moore, Oklahoma. Multiple structures damaged. Power out for 15,000 homes. Storm chasers tracking second funnel.
Bushfire out of control in New South Wales. 50,000 hectares burned. 12 homes destroyed. RFS crews exhausted. Air tankers deployed from Victoria.
Moderate earthquake M5.4 off the coast of Japan. Tsunami advisory issued for Miyagi Prefecture. Coastal residents advised to move to higher ground.
River Rhine flooding in Cologne. Water levels 8m above normal. Old town evacuated. Sandbag operations underway. #Hochwasser #Cologne
Forest fire near Antalya spreading toward resort areas. Tourists being relocated. 3 hotels evacuated. Turkish firefighters requesting international aid.
Tropical storm making landfall in the Philippines. Heavy rain and flooding in Leyte province. 10,000 people in evacuation centers. #TyphoonPH
Heatwave emergency in Phoenix. 5th consecutive day above 115°F. Hospitals overwhelmed with heat stroke patients. Cooling centers at max capacity.
Landslide in Freetown, Sierra Leone. Heavy rains triggered hillside collapse. At least 50 homes buried. Rescue operations hampered by continued rain.
Minor flooding reported in Venice. Acqua alta reaching 110cm. St. Mark's Square under water. MOSE barriers partially activated.
Earthquake swarm near Reykjavik. 200+ tremors in 24 hours. Largest M4.8. Volcanic eruption risk elevated. Civil protection on alert. #Iceland
Cyclone Amphan aftermath: Kolkata still without power 48 hours later. Trees blocking major roads. Clean water shortage. Aid convoys stuck.
Grass fire in California wine country. Napa Valley vineyards threatened. Mandatory evacuation for Calistoga. Smoke advisory for entire Bay Area.
Severe thunderstorm with golf-ball sized hail hitting Dallas-Fort Worth. Thousands of cars damaged. Airport closed. Multiple injuries reported.
Tsunami warning cancelled for Chile after M6.8 offshore quake. Initial scare caused evacuations in Valparaiso. All clear now. No casualties.
CRITICAL: Chemical plant explosion in Tianjin port area. Massive fireball visible for miles. Emergency services overwhelmed. Nearby residents told to shelter in place.
Flooding continues in Bangladesh. Sylhet district 80% underwater. 500,000 displaced. Food and medicine running critically low. International aid needed urgently.
Dust storm reducing visibility to zero in Riyadh. Highway pileups reported. Schools closed. Stay indoors if possible. #SandStorm #Riyadh
Wildfire smoke advisory for Portland Oregon. AQI over 300. N95 masks recommended. Outdoor activities suspended. Schools switching to remote.
M6.2 earthquake rocks Haiti. Port-au-Prince buildings damaged. Hospitals report incoming casualties. UN coordinating emergency response. #HaitiEarthquake
River levels rising dangerously in Prague. Vltava expected to crest tomorrow. Flood barriers installed along Old Town. Museums moving collections upstairs.
Avalanche in Swiss Alps near Zermatt. Ski resort evacuated. 4 hikers missing. Helicopter rescue delayed by weather. Search dogs deployed.
Lightning-sparked fire in Yosemite National Park. 500 acres burned. Park partially closed. Campers evacuated from Glacier Point area. #YosemiteFire
Winter storm dropping 60cm of snow in Montreal. 200 car accidents today. Power outages affecting 80,000 homes. Metro delays across all lines.
Volcanic eruption at Mount Etna. Lava flow heading toward Catania suburbs. Airport closed. Ash cloud reaching 10km altitude. Flights diverted.
Flooding in Jakarta after overnight downpour. Major intersections impassable. Gov declares state of emergency. Schools and offices closed.
Just felt a strong earthquake here in Mexico City. Things fell off shelves. Building swaying for 30+ seconds. Everyone running outside. Scary.
Drought emergency declared in Cape Town. Day Zero approaching. Residents limited to 50 liters per day. Agriculture sector devastated. #CapeTownDrought
Blizzard conditions in Chicago. O'Hare airport closed. Wind chill -40°F. Frostbite risk in minutes. Warming centers open citywide. Stay indoors.
Mudslide blocks highway near Bogota Colombia. Several vehicles trapped. Rain continues. Emergency crews working to clear debris. Detours in place.
Flooding in Nairobi's Mathare slum. Homes washed away overnight. At least 20 missing. Red Cross setting up emergency shelters. Clean water needed.
Fire raging through Amazon rainforest near Manaus. Satellite imagery shows 200km smoke plume. Indigenous communities at risk. Deforestation fueling spread.
Storm surge flooding coastal areas of Vietnam. Da Nang beachfront under 1.5m water. Hotels evacuated. Typhoon center 200km offshore and approaching.
Strong aftershock M5.8 in Turkey following this morning's main quake. More buildings collapsed. Rescue workers forced to pause operations briefly.
Ice storm knocking down power lines across Tennessee. 200,000 without electricity. Roads coated in ice. National Guard activated. Multiple fatalities on highways.
Earthquake M4.5 near Athens Greece. Minor damage to older buildings. No casualties. Schools evacuated as precaution. Aftershock sequence expected.
Glacial lake outburst flood (GLOF) in Nepal. Rapid water surge destroying bridges in Solukhumbu district. Trekkers stranded near Everest base camp.
Peat fires burning underground in Sumatra. Surface fires spreading to palm oil plantations. Thick haze covering Singapore. PSI readings unhealthy.
Derecho storm ripping through Iowa. 100mph straight-line winds. Grain silos toppled. Entire corn crop flattened in affected counties. State of emergency.
Heavy rains causing sewage overflow in London. Thames Barrier closed. Underground stations flooded. Commuters stranded. TfL suspending multiple lines.
Wildfire approaching Lake Tahoe from the south. Caldor Fire jumping containment lines. Mandatory evacuation for South Lake Tahoe. 30,000 residents fleeing.
Cyclone Idai aftermath in Mozambique. Beira 90% destroyed. Cholera outbreak confirmed. WHO deploying medical teams. Death toll rising.
Hailstorm devastating crops in Punjab, India. Farmers report total loss of wheat harvest. Grapefruit-sized hail damaging roofs. Insurance claims flooding in.
Small brush fire near residential area in San Diego. 2 acres, 50% contained. One home with minor damage. No injuries. Cause under investigation.
Flooding receding in Bangkok after 3 days. Cleanup operations beginning. Damage assessment underway. Boil water advisory still in effect for 6 districts.
Earthquake M7.8 strikes near Kathmandu. Major structural collapse. Multiple hospitals damaged and unable to operate. International search and rescue teams requested.
Record rainfall in Seoul. Han River at highest level in 50 years. Subways flooded. Government activating all emergency shelters. Military on standby.
Wildfire in Sardinia Italy destroys 20,000 hectares of forest. EU activating Civil Protection Mechanism. Water bombers from France and Spain arriving.
Tropical depression forming in Gulf of Mexico. Could strengthen to hurricane by Thursday. Gulf coast states beginning preparations. Oil rigs evacuating workers.
Aftershock panic in Malatya. People refusing to enter buildings. Tent cities growing. Temperature dropping to -5C tonight. Heaters and blankets desperately needed.
Flash floods in Jeddah Saudi Arabia. Cars floating through streets. Shopping malls flooded. Airport runways underwater. All flights cancelled until further notice.
Moderate earthquake felt across Los Angeles. M4.2 centered near Pasadena. Some cracked walls reported. No major damage. Caltech monitoring for aftershocks.
Heavy snowfall isolating villages in northern Pakistan. Avalanche risk extreme. Army helicopters unable to fly due to weather. Food supplies running low.
UPDATE: Houston flooding death toll rises to 4. Coast Guard conducting rooftop rescues. Shelters at NRG Center reaching capacity. Donations pouring in.
